title: astragalus hamosus var. trimestris
intro: Astragalus hamosus var. trimestris, also known as three-stemmed milk-vetch, is a perennial herb belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Astragalus hamosus var. trimestris include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and cardiovascular protective effects. Astragalus hamosus var. trimestris can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
